authors_text: Fuqiang Zhao,Wei Yang,Jiakai Zhang,Pei Lin,Yingliang Zhang,Jingyi Yu,Lan Xu
title: HumanNeRF: Efficiently Generated Human Radiance Field from Sparse Inputs
title_zh: HumanNeRF：从稀疏输入有效生成人体辐射场
abstract: Recent neural human representations can produce high-quality multi-view rendering but require using dense multi-view inputs and costly training. They are hence largely limited to static models as training each frame is infeasible. We present HumanNeRF - a generalizable neural representation - for high-fidelity free-view synthesis of dynamic humans. Analogous to how IBRNet assists NeRF by avoiding per-scene training, HumanNeRF employs an aggregated pixel-alignment feature across multi-view inputs along with a pose embedded non-rigid deformation field for tackling dynamic motions. The raw HumanNeRF can already produce reasonable rendering on sparse video inputs of unseen subjects and camera settings. To further improve the rendering quality, we augment our solution with an appearance blending module for combining the benefits of both neural volumetric rendering and neural texture blending. Extensive experiments on various multi-view dynamic human datasets demonstrate the generalizability and effectiveness of our approach in synthesizing photo-realistic free-view humans under challenging motions and with very sparse camera view inputs.
summary: Recent neural human representations can produce high-quality multi-view rendering but require using dense multi-view inputs and costly training. They are hence largely limited to static models as training each frame is infeasible. We present HumanNeRF - a generalizable neural representation - for high-fidelity free-view synthesis of dynamic humans. Analogous to how IBRNet assists NeRF by avoiding per-scene training, HumanNeRF employs an aggregated pixel-alignment feature across multi-view inputs along with a pose embedded non-rigid deformation field for tackling dynamic motions. The raw HumanNeRF can already produce reasonable rendering on sparse video inputs of unseen subjects and camera settings. To further improve the rendering quality, we augment our solution with an appearance blending module for combining the benefits of both neural volumetric rendering and neural texture blending. Extensive experiments on various multi-view dynamic human datasets demonstrate the generalizability and effectiveness of our approach in synthesizing photo-realistic free-view humans under challenging motions and with very sparse camera view inputs.
abstract_zh: 最近的神经人类表示可以产生高质量的多视图渲染，但需要使用密集的多视图输入和昂贵的训练。因此，它们在很大程度上仅限于静态模型，因为训练每一帧是不可行的。我们提出了 HumanNeRF——一种可泛化的神经表征——用于动态人类的高保真自由视图合成。与 IBRNet 如何通过避免按场景训练来协助 NeRF 类似，HumanNeRF 采用跨多视图输入的聚合像素对齐功能以及嵌入姿势的非刚性变形场来处理动态运动。原始 HumanNeRF 已经可以对看不见的主题和相机设置的稀疏视频输入产生合理的渲染。为了进一步提高渲染质量，我们通过外观混合模块增强了我们的解决方案，以结合神经体积渲染和神经纹理混合的优点。对各种多视图动态人体数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的方法在具有挑战性的运动和非常稀疏的相机视图输入下合成照片般逼真的自由视图人体的通用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HumanNeRF，一种从稀疏输入高效生成高保真动态人体辐射场的方法，解决传统方法依赖密集输入和高昂训练成本的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经人体表示方法需依赖密集多视角输入且训练成本高，难以处理动态场景。需开发一种通用、高效的动态人体自由视角合成方法。
AI.method: 结合多视角像素对齐特征与姿态嵌入非刚性变形场，引入外观混合模块融合体积分渲染与纹理混合优势，实现稀疏输入下的高质量渲染。
AI.result: 在多个动态人体数据集上验证了方法的泛化性，能在稀疏相机视角输入下生成逼真动态人体自由视角图像。
AI.conclusion: HumanNeRF通过创新架构有效解决了动态人体建模中稀疏输入与高保真渲染的矛盾，为实时动态场景重建提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhizhong Wang,Lei Zhao,Haibo Chen,Ailin Li,Zhiwen Zuo,Wei Xing,Dongming Lu
title: Texture Reformer: Towards Fast and Universal Interactive Texture Transfer
title_zh: 纹理改革者：迈向快速和通用的交互式纹理传输
abstract: In this paper, we present the texture reformer, a fast and universal neural-based framework for interactive texture transfer with user-specified guidance. The challenges lie in three aspects: 1) the diversity of tasks, 2) the simplicity of guidance maps, and 3) the execution efficiency. To address these challenges, our key idea is to use a novel feed-forward multi-view and multi-stage synthesis procedure consisting of I) a global view structure alignment stage, II) a local view texture refinement stage, and III) a holistic effect enhancement stage to synthesize high-quality results with coherent structures and fine texture details in a coarse-to-fine fashion. In addition, we also introduce a novel learning-free view-specific texture reformation (VSTR) operation with a new semantic map guidance strategy to achieve more accurate semantic-guided and structure-preserved texture transfer. The experimental results on a variety of application scenarios demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our framework. And compared with the state-of-the-art interactive texture transfer algorithms, it not only achieves higher quality results but, more remarkably, also is 2-5 orders of magnitude faster. Code is available at https://github.com/EndyWon/Texture-Reformer.

abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了纹理重组器，这是一种快速且通用的基于神经的框架，用于在用户指定的指导下进行交互式纹理传输。挑战在于三个方面：1）任务的多样性，2）引导图的简单性，3）执行效率。为了应对这些挑战，我们的关键思想是使用一种新颖的前馈多视图和多阶段合成程序，包括 I) 全局视图结构对齐阶段、II) 局部视图纹理细化阶段和 III) 整体效果增强阶段，以从粗到细的方式合成具有连贯结构和精细纹理细节的高质量结果。此外，我们还引入了一种新颖的免学习特定视图纹理重组（VSTR）操作，具有新的语义图引导策略，以实现更准确的语义引导和结构保留的纹理传输。多种应用场景的实验结果证明了我们框架的有效性和优越性。与最先进的交互式纹理传输算法相比，它不仅可以获得更高质量的结果，更值得注意的是，速度也快了 2-5 个数量级。代码可在 https://github.com/EndyWon/Texture-Reformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种快速且通用的交互式纹理迁移框架，解决任务多样性、指导图简单性和执行效率的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式纹理迁移方法在处理多样化任务、简化用户指导和提升效率方面存在局限，需更高效和通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用多阶段合成流程（全局结构对齐、局部纹理细化、整体增强）及无需学习的视图特定纹理重塑（VSTR）操作，结合语义图指导策略。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在多种场景下效果更优，速度比现有算法快2-5倍。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过创新方法实现了高质量、高效率的纹理迁移，具有广泛的应用前景。
